inputs.label: Measured Value
inputs.businessContext: The measured physical quantity (e.g., sound pressure in Pascals).

businessContext_i18n.en: The measured physical quantity (e.g., sound pressure in Pascals).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ölçülen fiziksel büyüklük (örneğin, Pascal cinsinden ses basıncı).
businessContext_i18n.de: Die gemessene physikalische Größe (z. B. Schalldruck in Pascal).
businessContext_i18n.fr: La grandeur physique mesurée (par exemple, pression acoustique en Pascals).
businessContext_i18n.es: La cantidad física medida (por ejemplo, presión sonora en Pascales).

inputs.label: Reference Value
inputs.businessContext: The reference quantity for the level calculation. Typical reference for sound pressure is 20 µPa.

businessContext_i18n.en: The reference quantity for the level calculation. Typical reference for sound pressure is 20 µPa.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Seviye hesaplaması için referans büyüklük. Ses basıncı için tipik referans 20 µPa'dır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die Referenzgröße für die Pegelberechnung. Typischer Referenzwert für Schalldruck ist 20 µPa.
businessContext_i18n.fr: La grandeur de référence pour le calcul du niveau. La référence typique pour la pression acoustique est 20 µPa.
businessContext_i18n.es: La cantidad de referencia para el cálculo del nivel. La referencia típica para presión sonora es 20 µPa.

inputs.label: dB Multiplier
inputs.businessContext: 20 for amplitude quantities (pressure, voltage), 10 for power quantities.

businessContext_i18n.en: 20 for amplitude quantities (pressure, voltage), 10 for power quantities.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Genlik büyüklükleri (basınç, voltaj) için 20, güç büyüklükleri için 10.
businessContext_i18n.fr: 20 pour les grandeurs d'amplitude (pression, tension), 10 pour les grandeurs de puissance.
businessContext_i18n.es: 20 para cantidades de amplitud (presión, voltaje), 10 para cantidades de potencia.

inputs.label: System Gain (dB)
inputs.businessContext: Additional gain or attenuation in the system, in decibels. Positive for amplification, negative for attenuation.

businessContext_i18n.en: Additional gain or attenuation in the system, in decibels. Positive for amplification, negative for attenuation.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sistemdeki ek kazanç veya zayıflama, desibel cinsinden. Yükseltme için pozitif, zayıflatma için negatif.
businessContext_i18n.de: Zusätzliche Verstärkung oder Dämpfung im System in Dezibel. Positiv für Verstärkung, negativ für Dämpfung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Gain ou atténuation supplémentaire dans le système, en décibels. Positif pour l'amplification, négatif pour l'atténuation.
businessContext_i18n.es: Ganancia o atenuación adicional en el sistema, en decibelios. Positivo para amplificación, negativo para atenuación.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
